title: physostigma cylindrospermum
intro: Physostigma cylindrospermum, also known as the Calabar bean, is a plant native to West Africa that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anticholinergic and a cardiac depressant. The Calabar bean has been used to treat various health issues, such as epilepsy, tetanus, and rheumatism, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are often dried and used to make a tincture or tea that can be used to treat various ailments, but caution is advised due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
